relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Sacred colors become woven garments for holy service.
The ephod is made in gold and color.
Gold is hammered into thread and woven into beauty.
Shoulder pieces join the ephod.
The woven band matches the work.
Onyx stones are engraved with Israel’s names.
The names rest on shoulders as remembrance.
The breastpiece is made like the ephod.
It is doubled and square.
The first row of stones is set.
The second row is set.
The third row is set.
The fourth row completes the breastpiece.
Twelve stones carry the twelve tribes by name.
Gold cords are made.
Settings and rings are prepared.
Gold cords attach to the breastpiece.
The cords join breastpiece to shoulder pieces.
Inner rings secure the edge.
Ephod rings receive the binding.
Blue cord holds breastpiece and ephod together.
The blue robe is woven.
Its opening is bound so it will not tear.
Pomegranates are made for the hem.
Gold bells are set among pomegranates.
Bell and pomegranate sound around the robe.
Fine linen tunics are woven.
Turban, caps, and linen undergarments are made.
The sash is embroidered in sacred colors.
The gold plate declares Holy to YHWH.
Blue cord fastens holiness to the turban.
All work of the dwelling is completed as commanded.
The dwelling and its structure are brought to Moses.
The coverings and veil are brought.
Ark, poles, and cover are brought.
Table, vessels, and bread are brought.
Lampstand, lamps, vessels, and oil are brought.
Gold altar, oil, incense, and entrance screen are brought.
Bronze altar, basin, and vessels are brought.
Court hangings, pillars, screen, cords, pegs, and vessels are brought.
Priestly garments are brought for holy service.
Israel does all the work as YHWH commanded.
Moses sees the completed work and blesses them.

contemplative_note: Exodus 39 is completion and blessing: names on shoulders and heart, holiness on the forehead, all work brought to Moses, and the makers blessed.
